tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def repo-groups (group-by :repo filtered-prs))
(def repo-counts (into {} (map (fn [[repo prs]] [repo (count prs)]) repo-groups)))
(def total-count (count filtered-prs))
(def max-additions-pr (apply max-key :additions filtered-prs))

{:repo-counts repo-counts
 :total-count total-count
 :max-additions-pr max-additions-pr}"}
